message:
feat(hostcall): enhance S3-FIFO fallback transitions, ghost recency, and Bravo writer recovery

Hostcall queue (hostcall_queue.rs):
- Re-export S3FifoFallbackReason (pub use) so integration tests and
  downstream modules can reference fallback reasons directly
- Add bravo_writer_recovery_refreshes_on_repeated_starvation test:
  validates that Bravo contention policy refreshes the recovery window
  counter when writer starvation recurs during an active recovery
  period, then exits cleanly to Balanced mode after the budget expires

S3-FIFO cache policy (hostcall_s3_fifo.rs):
- Add fallback_reason_transitions_low_signal_to_fairness_after_clear:
  verifies that after clearing a low-signal fallback, a second epoch
  with budget rejections correctly transitions to fairness fallback
- Add fallback_reason_transitions_fairness_to_low_signal_after_clear:
  the reverse direction — fairness fallback clears and low-signal
  triggers on the next epoch
- Add push_ghost_reinsertion_updates_recency_without_duplicates: proves
  that re-inserting an existing ghost key moves it to the newest slot
  without creating duplicates, and capacity enforcement still evicts
  correctly after recency updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
